problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: If CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
